description: Native English (American). Male, early 60s. Professional quality. Persona: Detroit grid elder. Emotion: dry, blunt, gruff. A low gravelled carrying bass with a working-class Detroit cadence, unhurried and certain; he states rather than performs, going quieter and flatter when most sure he is right, with deadpan humor aimed at machines.
text: They keep telling me it can't fail. [scoffs] Heard that on every dead grid I walked. A machine's only worth the hands that can open it... so I name the part, name the fault. [serious] No magic. Just the work.
